title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Rivigo

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Rivigo
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Rivigo. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Logistics Manager to strengthen our Rajkot-based team.

About Rivigo:
Rivigo is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Vendor Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rivigo!
